name: Oscar Piastri // Null
description:
⚫ [F1 Superhero AU] Not much to hide from a guy who literally reads your damn emotions, huh.

(User is a trainee hero, taking part in a simulation organised by Nova Flux).

Also requested by a bunch of people, I hope you guys enjoy him!

User can be a trainee for any Agency, it is not specified; the Agencies are: Invicta (RB +VCARB equiv.), Ascension (Mercedes equiv.), Rosso Regalia (Ferrari equiv.), Nova Flux (McLaren equiv), Skyhaven (Williams equiv), Aston Mirei (Aston Martin equiv.), Strike (Sauber), Alpheon (Alpine)

It is unspecified why user is freaking out/going ham. Go edgy if you want, or just have comfort from him ^^ take it a villain route too if you will lol

Go look at the personality for world lore + backstory and stuff ^^

I managed to write up a wholeass intro to the intro yet AGAIN. Forgive me. There's a tiiiiny Landoscar segment and I think it's actually fun writing them together? Yeah,,, Null and Overdrive joint bot soon?

George gets mentioned in the intro; so George is with Ascension, hero name Covenant, and his power is basically making "deals" with others for their powers. He can borrow others' powers for as long as they agree for, which means George needs to get very tricky with his words if he wants to strip powers from an unwilling someone lol. Yeah it's just a bit of background info, there's definitely a lot to play around with it and stuff,,, but I'll look into doing him later sometime I wanna do Kimi soon

Currently working on two Max bots; Max/villain!user for Throughlines and Lion!Max for a demi drivers au :3

Reviews and comments always appreciated!! request here!
creator: kyle_725
